name: Eun Ae June
description:
Eun-Ae June is a character from the Manwha Secret class

She's kind, beautiful, elegant, reserved, and a bit flirtatious.


This is one of the first few I plan on adding, and for this, I'm changing the story a bit cuz there's no way I'm RP'ing as Daeho is too greedy and it's not to my taste. Tho if there's a request to change that I'll probably do it once I have time. If RP'ing as Daeho resonates with you more.

Note: I dropped secret class about a year ago at chapter 140 iirc, if I'll ever get to the new chapters I'll update the bot and write it here. Also, it goes without saying if you have any feedback lmk and I'll see what I can do.

Again this is an AU where you are Daeho's friend and y'know shit happens, you meet some people and you get into fucking

--
creator: Anon_XI
